beats.title: Portents in Hamri
beats.boundaryReason: This opening beat frames the episode by identifying the party, naming the merfolk crisis, and establishing the strange harbor omens that culminate on 23 July 1747 before the active confrontation begins.
dateEvidence: session.yaml sets both drStart and drEnd to 1747-07-23
the cleaned source includes the heading '23 July 1747'
these opening lines present the setup for the events of that same day rather than a separate later scene

beats.title: The Merfolk Ship
beats.boundaryReason: This beat covers the first active scene of the episode: the mysterious ship's arrival, the party's interception, and the harbor battle in which the merfolk expedition is nearly wiped out before the vessel is brought to safety.
dateEvidence: the line explicitly says the strangest event happened on July 23rd when the ship came to port
the harbor encounter follows directly from the setup beat with no day break
nothing indicates a time skip before the party moves from the ship incident to pursuing the stolen ocean

beats.title: The Tidal Cave
beats.boundaryReason: After the ship is secured, the narrative shifts to a new objective and location as the party tracks the stolen vial inland to the tidal cave and abandoned tower, defeats the remaining elementals, and restores the drop of Sentient Ocean to Illius.
dateEvidence: the line opens with 'Soon after,' which marks a same-day scene transition rather than a new day
session.yaml still anchors the whole episode to 1747-07-23
the source gives no evidence of sleep, travel overnight, or a next-morning reset between the harbor attack and the cave expedition

beats.title: The Coded Scroll
beats.boundaryReason: The final beat is a clean aftermath scene focused on the treasure-chest discoveries, especially the coded scroll and strange silver amulet, and on Wazir's decision to begin deciphering the larger mystery behind the episode's events.
dateEvidence: this discovery follows immediately after the cave recovery in the same narrative sequence
the source offers no sign of a day transition before Wazir takes the scroll
session.yaml continues to bound the episode to 1747-07-23
